identity.name: David Melara
identity.headline: Executive Educator in Strategic Marketing, Negotiation and Market Intelligence

profile.summary: Executive educator and facilitator with experience translating market, negotiation and operational concepts into applied frameworks for decision-makers. Combines academic delivery with real commercial and operational background, enabling executive audiences to connect theory with implementation.

page1Experience.role: Senior Lecturer — Strategic Marketing and Negotiation
page1Experience.description: Trained executive audiences in strategic negotiation, consumer psychology and market intelligence, translating complex concepts into applied decision frameworks.
Designed competitiveness and market intelligence initiatives that strengthened the practical relevance of executive education and institutional development.

page1Experience.role: Head of Sales Operations / Strategic Manager
page1Experience.description: Applied consultative selling, account prioritization and operational alignment frameworks that enriched executive teaching with real-world implementation cases.

page2Experience.role: Senior Key Account and Operational Integration Lead
page2Experience.description: Recent operational and commercial experience that provides real-case substance for executive teaching in service coordination, client management and systems thinking.

jobs.description: Professional market experience in regulated healthcare environments, contributing rigor and field perspective to executive education.
Commercial field experience that strengthens the applied and practical depth of executive learning delivery.
